import Mathlib.Geometry.Manifold.Instances.Real

/-!
# Locally Modelled Spaces
Diffeological space that are locally modelled on a family of other diffeological spaces.
This mainly functions are infrastructure for manifolds and orbifolds, setting up their
definitions and a few basic facts they have in common.
-/

open Topology

/-- A diffeological space is locally modelled by a family of diffeological spaces if each point
in it has a neighbourhood that's diffeomorphic to a space in the family. -/
class LocallyModelled {őĻ : Type*} (M : őĻ ‚Üí Type*) [(i : őĻ) ‚Üí DiffeologicalSpace (M i)]
    (X : Type*) [DiffeologicalSpace X] : Prop where
  locally_modelled : ‚ąÄ x : X, ‚ąÉ (u : Set X), IsOpen[DTop] u ‚ąß x ‚ąą u ‚ąß
    ‚ąÉ (i : őĻ) (v : Set (M i)), IsOpen[DTop] v ‚ąß Nonempty (u ŠĶą‚ČÉ v)

/-- A diffeological space is a manifold if it is locally modelled by R^n.
We do not require Hausdorffness or second-countability here. -/
abbrev IsDiffeologicalManifold (n : ‚Ąē) (X : Type*) [DiffeologicalSpace X] :=
  LocallyModelled (fun _ : Unit ‚Ü¶ Eucl n) X

/-- A diffeological space is a manifold with boundary if it is locally modelled by the
half-space H^n.
We do not require Hausdorffness or second-countability here. -/
abbrev IsManifoldWithBoundary (n : ‚Ąē) [Zero (Fin n)] (X : Type*) [DiffeologicalSpace X] :=
  LocallyModelled (fun _ : Unit ‚Ü¶ {x : Eucl n | 0 ‚Č§ x 0}) X

/-- A diffeological space is an orbifold if it is locally modelled by quotients of R^n by finite
subgroups of GL(n). -/
abbrev IsOrbifold (n : ‚Ąē) (X : Type*) [DiffeologicalSpace X] :=
  LocallyModelled (fun őď : {őď : Subgroup ((Eucl n) ‚ČÉ‚āó[‚ĄĚ] (Eucl n)) | Finite őď} ‚Ü¶
    MulAction.orbitRel.Quotient őď (Eucl n)) X

/-- Any D-open subset of a locally modelled space is locally modelled by the same family of
spaces. -/
protected theorem IsOpen.locallyModelled {X őĻ : Type*} [DiffeologicalSpace X] {M : őĻ ‚Üí Type*}
    [(i : őĻ) ‚Üí DiffeologicalSpace (M i)] (h : LocallyModelled M X) {u : Set X}
    (hu : IsOpen[DTop] u) : LocallyModelled M u :=
  ‚ü®fun x ‚Ü¶ by
    let _ : TopologicalSpace X := DTop; let _ : (i : őĻ) ‚Üí TopologicalSpace (M i) := fun _ ‚Ü¶ DTop
    have : DTopCompatible X := ‚ü®rfl‚ü©; have : DTopCompatible u := hu.dTopCompatible
    have _ : (i : őĻ) ‚Üí DTopCompatible (M i) := fun _ ‚Ü¶ ‚ü®rfl‚ü©

    have := hv.dTop_compatible; have := hv'.dTop_compatible
    refine ‚ü®(‚ÜĎ) ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' v,?_,(by exact hxv),i,?_‚ü©
    ¬∑ rw [dTop_eq u]; exact hv.preimage continuous_subtype_val
    have e : ((‚ÜĎ) ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' v : Set u) ŠĶą‚ČÉ ((‚ÜĎ) ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' u : Set v) := by
      have e := DDiffeomorph.Set.nested ((‚ÜĎ) ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' v : Set u)
      have e' := DDiffeomorph.Set.nested ((‚ÜĎ) ‚ĀĽ¬Ļ' u : Set v)

    have e' := (e.trans (d.restrict _)).trans (DDiffeomorph.Set.nested _)
    refine ‚ü®_,hv'.isOpenMap_subtype_val _ ?_,‚ü®e'‚ü©‚ü©
    exact ((dTop_eq X ‚Ėł hu).preimage continuous_subtype_val).preimage d.symm.dsmooth.continuous'‚ü©

/-- Any D-open subset of a diffeological manifold is a diffeological manifold. -/
protected theorem IsOpen.isDiffeologicalManifold {X : Type*} [DiffeologicalSpace X] {n : ‚Ąē}
    (h : IsDiffeologicalManifold n X) {u : Set X} (hu : IsOpen[DTop] u) :
    IsDiffeologicalManifold n u :=
  hu.locallyModelled h

/-- Any D-open subset of a diffeological manifold with boundary is a diffeological

protected theorem IsOpen.isManifoldWithBoundary {X : Type*} [DiffeologicalSpace X] {n : ‚Ąē}
    [Zero (Fin n)] (h : IsManifoldWithBoundary n X) {u : Set X} (hu : IsOpen[DTop] u) :

```tactics
/-!
# Locally Modelled Spaces
Diffeological space that are locally modelled on a family of other diffeological spaces.
This mainly functions are infrastructure for manifolds and orbifolds, setting up their
definitions and a few basic facts they have in common.
-/

open Topology

/-- A diffeological space is locally modelled by a family of diffeological spaces if each point
in it has a neighbourhood that's diffeomorphic to a space in the family. -/
class LocallyModelled {őĻ : Type*} (M : őĻ ‚Üí Type*) [(i : őĻ) ‚Üí DiffeologicalSpace (M i)]
    (X : Type*) [DiffeologicalSpace X] : Prop where
  locally_modelled : ‚ąÄ x : X, ‚ąÉ (u : Set X), IsOpen[DTop] u ‚ąß x ‚ąą u ‚ąß
    ‚ąÉ (i : őĻ) (v : Set (M i)), IsOpen[DTop] v ‚ąß Nonempty (u ŠĶą‚ČÉ v)
```

```tactics
/-!
# Locally Modelled Spaces
Diffeological space that are locally modelled on a family of other diffeological spaces.
This mainly functions are infrastructure for manifolds and orbifolds, setting up their
definitions and a few basic facts they have in common.
-/

open Topology

/-- A diffeological space is a manifold if it is locally modelled by R^n.
We do not require Hausdorffness or second-countability here. -/
abbrev IsDiffeologicalManifold (n : ‚Ąē) (X : Type*) [DiffeologicalSpace X] :=
  LocallyModelled (fun _ : Unit ‚Ü¶ Eucl n) X

/-- A diffeological space is a manifold with boundary if it is locally modelled by the
half-space H^n.
We do not require Hausdorffness or second-countability here. -/
abbrev IsManifoldWithBoundary (n : ‚Ąē) [Zero (Fin n)] (X : Type*) [DiffeologicalSpace X] :=
  LocallyModelled (fun _ : Unit ‚Ü¶ {x : Eucl n | 0 ‚Č§ x 0}) X
```
